name: Archax
oneliner: FCA-regulated digital securities exchange, broker, and custodian — the UK's full-stack tokenisation venue. Series A $28.5M, Abrdn on the cap table.
finserv: FCA Cryptoasset Register (exchange, broker, custodian). Abrdn strategic stake. Tezos Foundation and Bitrock on the cap table. One of very few Western venues where you can issue, custody, and trade a tokenised security in one place.
team: UK institutional capital-markets leadership; Abrdn's presence on the cap table signals a clear enterprise distribution path and deep regulated-finance alignment.
thesis: Archax is one of very few Western venues where you can issue a tokenised security, custody it in a regulated entity, and trade it in one place. That end-to-end coverage with tier-1 institutional backing is exactly the Caroline Federal 'full-stack tokenisation' picture.
